mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hotel_kiosk.stocks (stock_name, stock_count, min_stock) VALUES (#{stockName}, #{stockCount}, #{minStock})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM hotel_kiosk.stocks ORDER BY stock_id
SELECT * FROM hotel_kiosk.stocks WHERE stock_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{stockName}, '%')
mapper.update: UPDATE hotel_kiosk.stocks SET stock_status = CASE WHEN stock_count >= min_stock THEN 'Clear' -- 양호 WHEN min_stock > stock_count THEN 'Shortage' -- 부족 END;
